title: RobotSF Benchmark Row Claim (v1)
description: Per-row claim record for a static leaderboard or benchmark summary row.

suite_id.description: Suite, stage, or benchmark surface that produced the row.

planner_mode.description: Runtime execution mode for this row.

seeds.description: Seeds used for the row. Use the explicit not_recorded marker when seeds are unknown and record that as an exclusion.

metrics.description: Named metrics reported for the row. Values may be numbers or 'not_recorded'.

row_status.description: Classification of the row under the fail-closed benchmark policy.

exclusions.description: Explicit exclusions, caveats, or missing-denominator reasons for the row. Use "none" only when the row has no caveats.

artifact_uri.description: Repository-relative path to the durable tracked evidence artifact. Must not be a worktree-local output/ path.

claim_wording.description: Exact wording this row supports. Must not overstate the evidence tier or row status.

evidence_tier.description: Highest evidence tier this row is allowed to support.

claim_boundary.description: Required one-line restatement of what the row cannot claim.
